title: Test Engineer
description:
**Job Title:** 
 Test Engineer
 



**Location:** 
 Bangalore
 



**Experience:** 
 3\\+ Years
 



**Education:** 
 Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical / Electronics Engineering
 



 Role Overview
 



 The Test Engineer will be responsible for developing and executing test solutions for oscillator products including TCXO and DCXO. The role involves ATE test program development, improving test efficiency, debugging test issues, and implementing automation for production testing.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



 Test Development
 


* Develop and maintain test plans and test methodologies for oscillator products (TCXO, DCXO).
* Define test coverage and characterization strategies for production and validation.



 ATE Test Program Development
 


* Develop and maintain test programs on ATE platforms such as Eagle, UltraFlex, and Advantest 93k.
* Support new product introduction (NPI) and production test program release.



 Test Optimization
 


* Improve test efficiency through:
* Test time reduction
* Parallel testing techniques
* Optimization of ATE resources.



 Debugging \\& Issue Resolution
 


* Debug failures during characterization and production.
* Work with design, product, and manufacturing teams to resolve test issues.



 Automation \\& Scripting
 


* Develop scripts to automate test flows, data collection, and analysis.
* Improve test infrastructure through automation and tooling enhancements.



**Required Technical Skills** 




 Semiconductor Test Expertise
 


* Understanding of oscillator testing (TCXO, DCXO) or similar analog / mixed signal devices.
* Experience with ATE based semiconductor testing.



 ATE Platforms
 



**Hands\\-on Experience With One Or More** 



* Teradyne UltraFlex
* Teradyne Eagle
* Advantest V93000 (93K)



 Programming / Automation
 


* Experience in test program development
* Scripting experience using Python / Perl / Tcl / similar automation tools



 Debugging \\& Analysis
 


* Strong debugging capability for ATE test failures
* Experience analyzing test data and yield trends



**Preferred Experience** 



* Experience in production test environment or semiconductor manufacturing.
* Exposure to mixed signal or RF device testing.
* Experience working with NPI test development flows.



 Collaboration
 



**The Test Engineer Will Work Closely With** 



* Design Engineers
* Product Engineers
* Validation Engineers
* Manufacturing / Operations Teams

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Cargill is a global leader in providing food, agriculture, financial, and industrial products and services. With a rich history spanning over 150 years, Cargill operates in over 70 countries, committed to nourishing the world in a safe, responsible, and sustainable manner. The company emphasizes innovation, sustainability, and operational excellence to meet the evolving needs of its customers and stakeholders. Cargill's diverse portfolio includes commodities trading, animal nutrition, food ingredients, and risk management solutions, all driven by a strong culture of integrity and collaboration.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Software Engineer \\- Azure Platform at Cargill plays a pivotal role in designing, developing, and maintaining advanced software applications and systems within the cloud ecosystem. This position primarily focuses on leveraging Azure, Azure DevOps, and Power Platform to enhance the company's ERP capabilities. The role involves collaborating with cross\\-functional teams to define technical requirements, develop scalable solutions, and improve existing software functionalities. The engineer will be responsible for platform engineering, application development, and driving innovation by integrating emerging technologies and best practices. They will also participate in code reviews, troubleshoot complex issues, and ensure the delivery of high\\-quality software solutions that meet business objectives and operational standards.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a minimum of 4 years of relevant experience, with a strong background in cloud platform development and deployment. Experience with Azure Platform, Power Platform, and/or SAP BTP Platform is essential. Candidates with additional expertise in AI, CoPilot Studio architecture, and application development will be preferred. A solid understanding of software development lifecycle, automation, and solution architecture is required. The candidate should demonstrate excellent problem\\-solving skills, the ability to work independently, and effective collaboration skills to work seamlessly within cross\\-functional teams.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 The core responsibilities for this role include designing, enabling, and configuring platform services in compliance with industry standards and best practices. Developing high\\-quality, maintainable, and efficient software solutions is a key aspect of the role. The engineer will lead efforts to automate deployment processes, ensuring reliable and smooth releases through the application of modern methodologies and tools. Collaborating with product managers, designers, and engineers is essential to gather complex requirements and deliver innovative solutions aligned with business needs. The role also involves writing and maintaining comprehensive unit and integration tests, debugging software issues, and optimizing performance. Continuous improvement initiatives are encouraged, including suggesting and implementing process enhancements. Providing solution architecture support and technical troubleshooting for deployed applications are vital responsibilities to minimize downtime and ensure operational excellence.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Cargill offers a competitive benefits package designed to support the well\\-being and professional growth of its employees. This includes comprehensive health insurance, retirement savings plans, paid time off, and wellness programs. Employees have access to ongoing training and development opportunities, fostering continuous learning and career advancement. The company promotes a flexible work environment, encouraging work\\-life balance. Additionally, employees are part of a global community dedicated to sustainability and making a positive impact on society and the environment. Cargill also provides various recognition programs and incentives to reward outstanding performance and contributions.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Cargill is an equal opportunity employer committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We celebrate diversity and are dedicated to providing equal employment opportunities regardless of race, gender, age, religion, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse workforce enhances our innovation and success, and we are committed to fostering a culture of respect, fairness, and opportunity for everyone.

We recognize that strength comes from diversity, and will embrace your outstanding skills, curiosity, and passion while giving you the opportunity to grow technically and as an individual.
   

  

 We invest and protect over $11 trillion (USD) of assets and have an extraordinary responsibility to our clients all over the world. Our technology empowers millions of investors to save for retirement, pay for college, buy a home, and improve their financial well\\-being.
   

  

 Being a technologist at BlackRock means you get the best of both worlds: working for one of the most sophisticated financial companies and being part of a software development team responsible for next generation technology and solutions.
   

  

**What are Aladdin and Aladdin Engineering?**
* You will be working on BlackRock's investment operating system called Aladdin. Aladdin is used both internally within BlackRock and externally by many financial institutions. Aladdin combines sophisticated risk analytics with comprehensive portfolio management, trading, and operations tools on a single platform to power informed decision\\-making and create a connective tissue for thousands of users investing worldwide.
* Our development teams reside inside the Aladdin Engineering group. We collaboratively build the next generation of technology that changes the way information, people, and technology intersect for global investment firms. We build and package tools that manage trillions in assets and supports millions of financial instruments. We perform risk calculations and process millions of transactions for thousands of users every day worldwide!


**Being a Member Of Aladdin Engineering, You Will Be**
* Tenacious: Work in a fast paced and highly complex environment
* Creative thinker: Analyse multiple solutions and deploy technologies in a flexible way.
* Great teammate: Think and work collaboratively and communicate effectively.
* Fast learner: Pick up new concepts and apply them quickly.


**Responsibilities Include**

* Deliver high efficiency, high availability, concurrent and fault tolerant software systems.
* Leverage AI in code generation, code analysis and test automation.
* Significantly contribute to development of Aladdin’s global, multi\\-asset trading platform.
* Work with product management and business users to define the roadmap for the product.
* Design and develop innovative solutions to complex problems, identifying issues and roadblocks.
* Apply validated quality software engineering practices through all phases of development.
* Ensure resilience and stability through quality code reviews, unit, regression and user acceptance testing, dev ops and level two production support.
* Be a leader with vision and a partner in brainstorming solutions for team productivity, efficiency, guiding and motivating others.
* Drive a strong culture by bringing principles of inclusion and diversity to the team and setting the tone through specific recruiting, management actions and employee engagement.
* Candidate should be able to lead individual projects priorities, deadlines and deliverables using AGILE methodologies.


**Qualifications**
* B.E./ B.TECH./ MCA or any other relevant engineering degree from a reputed university.
* 8\\+ years of proven experience


**Skills And Experience**
* A proven foundation in core Java and related technologies, with OO skills and design patterns
* Experience with AI platforms, APIs, or internal frameworks to integrate AI LLM/Models into your projects for Agentic capabilities.
* Track record building high quality software with design\\-focused and test\\-driven approaches
* Good hands\\-on object\\-oriented programming knowledge in Java, Spring, Microservices,
* Strong knowledge of Open\\-Source technology stack (Spring, Hibernate, Maven, JUnit, etc.).
* Experience with relational database and/or NoSQL Database (e.g., Apache Cassandra)
* Great analytical, problem\\-solving and communication skills
* Some experience or a real interest in finance, investment processes, and/or an ability to translate business problems into technical solutions.
* Candidate should have experience in building high scale application and being responsible for the design and technical quality of a significant application, system, or component.
* Exposure to building microservices and APIs ideally with REST, Kafka or gRPC.


**Nice To Have And Opportunities To Learn**
* Experience working in an agile development team or on open\\-source development projects.
* Experience with optimization, algorithms or related quantitative processes.
* Exposure to high scale distributed technology like Kafka, Mongo, Ignite, Redis
* Experience with Cloud platforms like Microsoft Azure, AWS, Google Cloud
* Experience with DevOps and tools like Azure DevOps


**Our Benefits**
 To help you stay energized, engaged and inspired, we offer a wide range of benefits including a strong retirement plan, tuition reimbursement, comprehensive healthcare, support for working parents and Flexible Time Off (FTO) so you can relax, recharge and be there for the people you care about.
   

  

**Our hybrid work model**
 BlackRock’s hybrid work model is designed to enable a culture of collaboration and apprenticeship that enriches the experience of our employees, while supporting flexibility for all. Employees are currently required to work at least 4 days in the office per week, with the flexibility to work from home 1 day a week. Some business groups may require more time in the office due to their roles and responsibilities. We remain focused on increasing the impactful moments that arise when we work together in person – aligned with our commitment to performance and innovation. As a new joiner, you can count on this hybrid model to accelerate your learning and onboarding experience here at BlackRock.
   

  

**About BlackRock**
 At BlackRock, we are all connected by one mission: to help more and more people experience financial well\\-being. Our clients, and the people they serve, are saving for retirement, paying for their children’s educations, buying homes and starting businesses. Their investments also help to strengthen the global economy: support businesses small and large; finance infrastructure projects that connect and power cities; and facilitate innovations that drive progress.
   

  

 This mission would not be possible without our smartest investment – the one we make in our employees. It’s why we’re dedicated to creating an environment where our colleagues feel welcomed, valued and supported with networks, benefits and development opportunities to help them thrive.
   

  

 For additional information on BlackRock, please visit @blackrock \\| Twitter: @blackrock \\| LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/blackrock

title: Principal Engineer - Aviation
description:
**About Strake Aero** 




  






 Strake Aero is a privately owned firm operating across the full aviation stack \\- aircraft sales, leasing, mission equipment customization, next gen training solutions, and bespoke SaaS.
 




  






 The SaaS business line—where this role is situated—is building the intelligent software backbone for the global industry. From aircraft acquisition and asset management to safety\\-critical operational workflows, we are replacing legacy tech with safety\\-first, data\\-driven platforms. We are on a mission to deliver world\\-class software to an industry that is long overdue for a digital transformation.
 




  





**About the Role** 




  






 We are looking for a Principal Engineer who embodies the "Master of One, Jack of All Trades" philosophy. At your core, you are a high\\-caliber builder—someone who takes pride in writing elegant, safety\\-critical code and architecting systems that scale. You will be the primary technical driver behind our aviation SaaS platforms, owning the development of our products from the initial commit to production.
 





 However, you aren't just an engineer; you are a product\\-minded strategist. You will serve as the technical anchor for our customers, bridging the gap between sophisticated engineering and real\\-world aviation operations. This is a role for a senior professional who wants to take full ownership of the technical lifecycle—designing the architecture, shipping the code, and ensuring every deployment delivers undeniable value to the aviation professionals who rely on it.
 




  





**What You’ll Do** 




  





**1\\. Technical Execution \\& Architecture** 



* Full\\-Stack Ownership: Lead the development of our suite of aviation apps using TypeScript (React, NestJS, etc) and Python (FastAPI, Airflow, etc).
* Systems Thinking: Own the DevOps pipeline, security protocols, and cloud infrastructure (GCP/AWS). You’ll ensure our systems are as reliable as the aircraft they help operate.
* AI Integration: Oversee the practical integration of AI to solve aviation problems (e.g., parsing maintenance logs or automating regulatory compliance).



  





**2\\. Solutions Strategy \\& Client Engagement** 



* The Technical Closer: Join the founders in high\\-stakes meetings to act as the technical authority. You’ll translate client pain points into architectural reality.
* Deployment \\& Success: Own the "Zero\\-to\\-One" deployment for new customers. You’ll lead the requirements gathering, iterative testing, and final rollout within the customer’s ecosystem.
* Product Roadmap: Act as the bridge between the "hangar" and the "code." Use direct customer feedback to influence what we build next.



  





**3\\. Scaling \\& Leadership** 



* Build the Crew: As we scale,
 

 Build and grow high\\-performing teams across development, testing, customer support, and UX/UI.
* Vendor Management: Manage specialized vendor networks for staff augmentation to keep the team agile and focused on core IP.
* Growth \\& Pipeline: Work closely with the founders to refine our market strategy and drive awareness of our product portfolio. You will develop an opportunity pipeline, pursue leads, and convert them into sales.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 




  




* The "Aviation Bug": Prior aviation experience isn't required, but a passion for the industry is. You should be the kind of person who is genuinely excited by aerospace—bonus points if you’ve ever spent time at an airfield or love the smell of Jet A1\\.
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience in aviation, computer science or relevant technical background and experience
* You are a seasoned Full\\-Stack engineer with a 5\\+ year track record of shipping complex products. You have the technical maturity to lead architectural decisions, optimize database performance, manage containerized deployments, etc., with a focus on stability, scalability and security
* Communication Mastery: You can explain a JWT authentication flow to a developer and a ROI\\-based value proposition to a CEO without missing a beat.
* Startup Grit: You thrive in the "Zero\\-to\\-One" phase. You don't wait for a ticket to be assigned; you find the gap and fill it.



  





**Why Join Us** 




  





**Competitive Compensation:** 

 We offer a salary that is at par with or better than market standards for mid\\-to\\-senior leadership positions.
 




  





**Learn from the best.** 

 Our leadership brings deep expertise in flight operations,  building safety\\-critical, enterprise\\-grade software for aviation. You'll receive genuine mentorship — not just oversight, but the kind of hands\\-on guidance that accelerates careers.
 




  





**Shape the stack.** 

 Our technology choices are modern but pragmatic, and they will continue to evolve. If you have a well\\-reasoned opinion about a better way to do something, you'll be heard.
 




  





**How to Apply** 




  






 Send us your résumé along with anything that shows us how you think — a GitHub profile, a side project, a blog, a portfolio, or even a short note about something you've built or broken and learned from.
 




  





**Email :** 
 contact@strakeaero.com
   




**Equal Opportunity \\& Inclusion at Strake Aero** 

  






 At Strake Aero, we believe that the future of aviation is built on a foundation of diverse perspectives and inclusive thinking. Our strength lies in our differences, and we are dedicated to creating a workspace where equality is championed and every individual is empowered to soar.
 





 We warmly welcome applications from all qualified candidates, irrespective of ethnicity, gender, disability, religion, sexual orientation, age, or social and cultural background. Your unique background is not just welcomed—it is celebrated as a vital part of our innovation.
 




  





**Data Privacy \\& Recruitment Integrity:** 




  




* **Consent:** 

 By submitting your CV or application, you consent to Strake Aero using and storing your information for monitoring and recruitment purposes. Your data will be used exclusively by Strake Aero.
* **Zero\\-Fee Policy:** 

 Strake Aero is committed to equal opportunities and will never ask for any form of monetary exchange during the recruitment process. If you encounter any person or entity requesting payment while impersonating our brand, please report it immediately to
 
**contact@strakeaero.com**

title: Associate – Water Supply Network Planning
description:
**Responsibilities**
* Leads the technical delivery of a water supply network planning and modelling. Carries out hydraulic calculations, analysis and investigations for clients using Infoworks WS Pro software for modelling projects and tasks, including preparation of reports, figures and other documents to a high level of grammatical and technical presentation.
* Carries out project works in accordance with our Integrated Management System (IMS). Work alongside project managers and junior team members to ensure efficient delivery. Delivers through teams, not individually.
* Demonstrates industry best practice for model build, calibration and system performance assessments, including leakage and demand analysis, pressure management and infrastructure / growth planning.
* Demonstrates how Infoworks WS Pro models can be used to support the development of zone management plans, water supply strategies and demand management plans.
* Uses Infoworks WS Pro in\\-built tools to successfully investigate complex water network operational scenarios.
* Applies sound engineering judgement to resolve modelling anomalies to improve overall modelling confidence and communicates all risks and limitations on use of hydraulic models to the project team and the client.
* Works without supervision, direct others and ensures their work is verified by an appropriate professional.
* Leads continuous digital improvement and innovation on water hydraulic modelling and can identify and implement opportunities to streamline processes and data management.
* Successfully supports, coaches and mentors hydraulic modelling professionals to achieve a good standard of hydraulic modelling, embedding a culture of successful project delivery whilst also holding them to account, reducing re\\-work and supporting the continuous growth of the WSP water modelling capability.
* Ensures project related quality processes are carried out (technical reviews, verification, approval to release etc.) in a timely and cost\\-effectively manner.
* Undertakes appropriate verification of all inputs and outputs on hydraulic modelling projects including GIS, SCADA, field data and growth projections.
* Provides regular feedback to team members in a constructive and timely manner.
* Completes tasks within allocated timeframes and budgeted hours.
* Ensures all technical risks are understood, managed, assigned to the organisation best placed to manage the risk, and these are well communicated with the project team, and/or client
* Solves problems effectively by applying knowledge of hydraulics and engaging sound problem solving techniques and appropriate analysis to find value engineered/innovative solutions.
* Maintains knowledge of appropriate technical standards, legislation, codes of practice and New Zealand standards; Is knowledgeable on industry developments, trends, and processes.
* Applies sound judgement to decisions about technical issues and solves problems for clients to get the best possible outcome for a project.
* Undertakes appropriate verification of projects and team members’ work.
* Considering risks to client’s business or reputation as part of the planning and management of projects.
* Delivering excellent service to clients to promote repeat and uncompetitive work.
* Develops and maintains an extensive network of industry contacts in India and NZ (as a minimum) and is readily able to access key people.
* Builds and maintains strong, trusted relationships with clients.
* Actively seeks feedback from clients and communicate this to the team to ensure successful delivery of projects and lessons learnt.
* Ensure projects and variations are scoped and priced in a manner that will ensure commercial success and that respond to the specific risk profile of the project.
* Writes and supports bids that are commercially astute, recognises and manages commercial risks while demonstrating value to the client.
* Hold focused meetings that achieve appropriate outcomes at key times; Deliver engaging, informative well\\-organized presentations; Create opportunities to share learnings, improvements, new tools, better practices etc with the wider water team.
* Liaise and work closely with Sector leadership and peer groups across India and New Zealand; Act as a brand ambassador of GCC within WSP in India across geographies.


**Required Skills And Behaviours**
* Fluent in spoken and written English and able to present ideas, complex technical information and advice in a way that is understandable to a wide range of audiences; Communicate difficult/sensitive information tactfully.
* Able to work effectively and competently with people at all levels; within and external to the organisation. Ability to work collaboratively and demonstrated capability to perform effectively as part of a team across a matrix type structure.
* Models WSP Guiding Principles.
* Strong organisational ability to optimise and prioritise conflicting demands in a busy environment, to achieve deadlines and see responsibilities through to completion; copes well under conflicting pressures.
* Commercial and a level of maturity needed to understand business needs and drivers.
* Projects a credible image and inspires confidence; Excellent interpersonal skills.
* Able to manage others and support them through stressful or challenging situations.
* Results orientated, with a reputation for, and demonstrated achievement of, key strategic priorities.
* Active commitment to continuous personal improvement.
* A team player and considers the views of others.
* Ensures that confidentiality is respected and maintained at all times.
* Consistently demonstrates trustworthiness, integrity, professionalism and honesty.
* Natural and confident leader displaying openness, accountability, decisiveness and engagement; Client centric and passionate about service excellence .
* Displays drive, energy and enthusiasm for getting things done with high levels of motivation and energy; Project credibility demonstrate professionalism and inspire confidence with high emotional intelligence and self\\-awareness of strengths and potential areas for development.
* Excellent analytical skills and strong attention to detail.
* Resilient, comfortable with change and ambiguity.


 Software Proficiencies
   

  

* Must be highly proficient in WS Pro software for all water supply network planning applications.
* Highly capable of developing own SQL or other user\\-script applications for Infoworks WS Pro.
* Proficient use of Windows, MS Word/Excel and other Microsoft Office applications.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelors Degree in Civil Engineering followed by a Masters in Water Resource Engineering or Environmental Engineering or similar
* Professional Registration (Chartered Engineer status or equivalent).


**Experience**
* Minimum of 15 years’ experience post qualification in water supply network planning, engineering and hydraulic modelling.
* Must have at least 8 years’ experience using WS Pro software and extensive use within the last 12 months.
* Demonstrable experience in developing SQL or other user\\-script applications for Infoworks WS Pro.
* Past experience in NZ, Australian or UK projects is preferred but not essential.
